---
title: "BISC_preprocessing"
author: "Clazz"
date: "2026-05-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r, include = F}

if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")

pacman::p_load(tidyverse, VIM, ggpubr, ggeffects, car, sjPlot,caret, ggrain, emmeans, skimr, lavaan, patchwork, lme4, lmerTest, gtsummary, huxtable, readxl, broom.mixed, pwrss, mediation)

```


```{r}
data<-read_csv("G:/My Drive/Data/BISC/1115_barcelonabeta_cognition_v3/1115_barcelonabeta_cognition_v3.csv")%>%
  dplyr::select(id_bisc, age_12w_m, ethnicity_m_3cat, hospital_delivery, educ_level_m_3cat, sex_0y_c, delivery_type_m_2cat, C_hip, C_pree, C_peeg, C_hel,C_DG , parity_m)%>%
  rename(subject = id_bisc,
         age_v1 = age_12w_m,
         ethnicity = ethnicity_m_3cat,
         education = educ_level_m_3cat,
         sex_child = sex_0y_c,
         gestational_diabates = C_DG,
         hellp = C_hel,
         preeclampsia_mild = C_pree,
         preeclampsia_severe = C_peeg)

write.csv(data, file = "G:/My Drive/Data/BISC/1115_barcelonabeta_cognition_v3/data_cleaned/basic_dataset.csv", row.names = F)
```

```{r}

biomarkers_dates<-read_csv("G:/My Drive/Data/BISC/1115_barcelonabeta_cognition_v3/1115_barcelonabeta_cognition_v3.csv")%>%
  dplyr::select(id_bisc, gestage_0y_c_days, eco_fur_12w_m, bl_date.extr_m_12w, bl_date.extr_m_32w, bl_col.date_m_0y, extraction_date, bl_gest.age.extr_m_12w)%>%
  rename(subject = id_bisc,
         gest_age_birth = gestage_0y_c_days,
         gest_age_v1 = bl_gest.age.extr_m_12w,
         date_last_period = eco_fur_12w_m,
         date_v1 = bl_date.extr_m_12w,
         date_v2 = bl_date.extr_m_32w,
         date_v3 = bl_col.date_m_0y,
         date_v4 = extraction_date)%>%
  mutate(date_v3 = if_else(is.na(date_v3), 
                         as.Date(date_last_period) + as.numeric(gest_age_birth), 
                         date_v3),
         gest_age_v1 = gest_age_v1*7,
         date_v1 = if_else(is.na(date_v1), 
                         as.Date(date_last_period) + as.numeric(gest_age_v1), 
                         date_v1))%>%
   dplyr::select(-gest_age_v1, -gest_age_birth)%>%
  pivot_longer(values_to = "Date", names_to = "Visit", cols = c(date_v1, date_v2, date_v3, date_v4))%>%
  mutate(Visit = parse_number(Visit))

biomarkers<-read_delim("G:/My Drive/Data/BISC/1115_barcelonabeta_cognition_v3/biomarkers_results_BISC.csv", delim = ";")%>%
  filter(Excluded == "FALSE")%>%
  dplyr::select(Participant_ID, Visit,Biomarker, Result_numeric, Units)%>%
  mutate(Result_numeric = gsub(" pg/ml", "", Result_numeric),
         Result_numeric = as.numeric(gsub(",", ".", Result_numeric)),
         Visit = as.numeric(parse_number(Visit)))%>%
  rename(subject = Participant_ID)%>%
  left_join(., biomarkers_dates, join_by(subject, Visit))

write.csv(biomarkers, file = "G:/My Drive/Data/BISC/1115_barcelonabeta_cognition_v3/data_cleaned/biomarkers.csv", row.names = F)
```
